items.title: Warren Buffett And His Successor Greg Abel Say Berkshire Hathaway Could Hold This $20B Bet For '50 Years Or Forever'
items.description: What began quietly years ago has grown into a defining long-term play for Berkshire Hathaway Inc. (NYSE: BRK-A) (NYSE: BRK-B), as the company signals no intention of slowing down or reassessing its $20 billion bet on Japanese trading companies, amid a changing macro scenario.

items.title: Cardinal Health, Northrop Grumman Among 7 Companies To Announce Dividend Increases In First Half Of May
items.description: Parker-Hannifin announced its latest payout boost. Check out companies that I expect will announce their annual dividend increases in the first half of May.

items.title: Apple: Rumored Gemini Partnership Is Good But The AI Deficit Is Alarming
items.description: Discover why Apple, although a well-managed business led by capable leaders, does not seem to be an attractive investment opportunity today.

items.title: Franklin U.S. Focused Growth SMA Q1 2025 Commentary
items.description: Stock markets worldwide were turbulent over 1Q25, with major US equity indexes, the S&P 500 Index, Dow Jones Industrial Average and NASDAQ Composite Index, sustaining overall declines.
